description: Project-scoped Riela workflow to adversarially review session persistence SQLite migration without committing or pushing.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Run design review, implementation review, then final output. This workflow must not commit, push, or mutate unrelated files.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise JSON only. Preserve unrelated dirty worktree changes. Do not commit or push. For review nodes, inspect the current repository state and diff before answering.

steps.description: Review the session persistence SQLite migration design before implementation.
Review the current session persistence implementation against the requested SQLite-only default behavior.
Summarize findings and next implementation actions.
